    Index

    B

    Board - Class in edu.txst.midterm
    Represents the game board, consisting of a grid of cells and a step counter.
    Board() - Constructor for class edu.txst.midterm.Board
    Constructs an empty board with the default dimensions.
    BoardLoader - Interface in edu.txst.midterm
    Interface defining the contract for classes capable of loading a Board from a specified file.

    C

    clone() - Method in class edu.txst.midterm.Board
    Creates and returns a deep copy of this Board, including its step counter and all cell values.
    CSVBoardLoader - Class in edu.txst.midterm
    Implements the BoardLoader interface to construct a Board by parsing a Comma-Separated Values (CSV) file.
    CSVBoardLoader() - Constructor for class edu.txst.midterm.CSVBoardLoader
     

    D

    decreaseSteps(int) - Method in class edu.txst.midterm.StepCounter
    Deducts taken steps, effectively giving the player more remaining steps.

    E

    edu.txst.midterm - package edu.txst.midterm
     

    G

    GameEngine - Class in edu.txst.midterm
    GameEngine handles the core logic of the 16-Bit Maze game.
    GameEngine(Board) - Constructor for class edu.txst.midterm.GameEngine
    Constructs a new GameEngine with the specified game board.
    getCell(int, int) - Method in class edu.txst.midterm.Board
    Retrieves the integer value of a specific cell in the grid.
    getMaxSteps() - Method in class edu.txst.midterm.StepCounter
    Retrieves the maximum steps allowed.
    getRemainingSteps() - Method in class edu.txst.midterm.StepCounter
    Computes the remaining steps available to the player.

    I

    increaseSteps() - Method in class edu.txst.midterm.StepCounter
    Registers a taken step by increasing the internal counter.
    isGameOver() - Method in class edu.txst.midterm.GameEngine
    Determines if the game is over due to the player running out of steps.

    L

    load(String) - Method in interface edu.txst.midterm.BoardLoader
    Loads a board from a given file path.
    load(String) - Method in class edu.txst.midterm.CSVBoardLoader
    Loads the board data from a CSV file.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class edu.txst.midterm.MazeGUI
    The main class to launch the Maze application.
    MazeGUI - Class in edu.txst.midterm
    MazeGUI provides the graphical user interface for the 16-Bit Maze game.
    MazeGUI() - Constructor for class edu.txst.midterm.MazeGUI
    Constructs the main GUI window, initializes panels, and sets up key listeners.
    movePlayer(int, int) - Method in class edu.txst.midterm.GameEngine
    Attempts to move the player.

    P

    playerWins() - Method in class edu.txst.midterm.GameEngine
    Determines if the player has reached the exit, meaning they win the game.

    R

    resetSteps() - Method in class edu.txst.midterm.StepCounter
    Purges the current step count, resetting it back to 0.

    S

    setCell(int, int, int) - Method in class edu.txst.midterm.Board
    Sets the value of a specific cell in the grid.
    setStepCounter(int) - Method in class edu.txst.midterm.Board
    Initializes the step counter for this board.
    stepCounter - Variable in class edu.txst.midterm.Board
     
    StepCounter - Class in edu.txst.midterm
    Manages the step limit and tracking for a level.
    StepCounter(int) - Constructor for class edu.txst.midterm.StepCounter
    Constructs a StepCounter mapped to a specific limit constraint.
